TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrew_Holness, title = Andrew_Holness, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrew_Holness} }

S.FORM: Andrew Holness Andrew Holness (ryax sa 22 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1972 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Jamaica ta' misuw hya' ga Andrew Holness, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Andrew Holness minkahul sa Spanish Town na Jamaica. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Andrew Holness Andrew Holness (ryax sa 22 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1972 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Jamaica ta' misuw hya' ga Andrew Holness, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Andrew Holness minkahul sa Spanish Town na Jamaica. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: an*rew ħolnes~ɕs~ɕ an*rew ħolnes~ɕs~ɕ (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *amaiʦ~ʨa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa an*rew ħolnes~ɕs~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral an*rew ħolnes~ɕs~ɕ minkaħul s~ɕa s~ɕpanis~ɕħ town na *amaiʦ~ʨa. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
